instruction: Set Finder to show all filename extensions {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §7 Tier-A defaults boolean NSGlobalDomain AppleShowAllExtensions).

args: defaults write -g AppleShowAllExtensions -bool {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
if [ {STATE} = on ]; then defaults write -g AppleShowAllExtensions -bool true; else defaults write -g AppleShowAllExtensions -bool false; fi; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
